summary: Frontend-only testing for 'The Infinity Archive' reading tracker app - verified two critical bug fixes: (1) Omnibus sub-item checkbox interactivity, (2) Layout/scrolling cut-off bug. All tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working. Sub-item checkboxes in omnibus entries are interactive (e.stopPropagation() fix working). Footer and bottom content are visible with pb-32 padding. localStorage persistence working correctly.

sub_item_checkbox_interactivity.details: Clicked Ravenwing checkbox inside 'Legacy of Caliban (Trilogy)' omnibus - state changed from aria-checked=false to aria-checked=true

page_count_update.details: Global page count updated from 0 to 320 when Ravenwing (320 pages) was checked

localStorage_persistence.details: localStorage correctly stores {'Legacy of Caliban (Trilogy)': {'contents': {'Ravenwing': True}}}. Data persists after page reload.

omnibus_progress.details: Shows '1/3 COMPLETE' when one sub-item is checked

scroll_padding.details: Content at bottom of page is accessible. Phase 7 (last phase) fully visible. pb-32 padding working.

footer_visibility.details: 'COGITATOR ONLINE' footer visible at y=935.75 within 1080px viewport

skull_rating_interactivity.details: SkullRating component is interactive. Rating saved to localStorage correctly (rating: 3)

visual_grimdark_style.details: Slate-950 background (rgb(7,10,19)), Amber-500 accents (rgb(245,159,10)), Orbitron/Cinzel fonts preserved
